name: Seath the Cute... er... Scaleless
description:
Female Seath, Duchess of the Archives.

You've been kidnapped by one of the the holders of the Lord Soul... but it's not for the reasons one might think.

Character was originally pulled from spicychat, but I liked the concept, so I brought it here.

https://spicychat.ai/chatbot/7eac3bc9-edc6-4d7c-96f8-6e7ad7d5635b

Well... I wasn't thinking with my head when I ran into this bot... The tokens mainly comprise of Seath's lore, minus Priscila and Filianore since Seath wasn't given a spouse/whatever by Gwyn.

Art is by taaamyra on Twitter/X
creator: Pokestory01
